title: Emoji and Reactions
drDigitalIntro: Emoji are small pictures you can use to express feelings. Instead of typing 'haha', you can send a laughing emoji 😂. Messages has thousands of emoji to choose from. You can also react to someone else's message — double-tap a message and choose a reaction (thumbs up, love, laughing, etc.). Reactions are a quick way to respond without typing a full message.
drDigitalSuccess: You can express yourself with emoji and reactions!
drDigitalHint: Emoji make messaging more fun and expressive.
